/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/efibootmgrgui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/src/bootmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/src/bootentry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/efibootmgrgui_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_com_efibootmgrgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/efibootmgrgui_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/efibootmgrgui_qml/main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/efibootmgrgui_qml/BootEntryDelegate_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/efibootmgrgui_qml/ConfirmDialog_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/efibootmgrgui_qml/AboutWindow_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_efibootmgrgui_raw_qml_0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efibootmgrgui.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_efibootmgrgui_raw_res_0.cpp.o -o efibootmgrgui  /usr/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
